name: Naabu
author: Security Assessment Dashboard
description: Fast port scanner from ProjectDiscovery. Detects installation and version only in this phase — no scan is executed.

install_instructions.linux: A Go binary: `go install github.com/projectdiscovery/naabu/v2/cmd/naabu@latest` (requires `libpcap-dev`), or install from the AUR (`yay -S naabu`). See docs/LINUX_TOOL_INSTALLATION.md for details.
